__aicore__ inline void Compute(uint32_t len)
{
    AscendC::LocalTensor<float> xLocal = inQueueX_.DeQue<float>();
    AscendC::LocalTensor<float> expLocal = tmpQueue_.AllocTensor<float>();
    AscendC::LocalTensor<float> oneOrZero = tmpQueue_.AllocTensor<float>(); // temporary for constant
    AscendC::LocalTensor<float> yLocal = outQueueY_.AllocTensor<float>();

    // exp(x)
    AscendC::Exp(expLocal, xLocal, len);

    // Subtract 1: create tensor of 1.0
    AscendC::Duplicate(oneOrZero, 1.0f, len);
    AscendC::Sub(expLocal, expLocal, oneOrZero, len); // expLocal = exp(x) - 1

    // Multiply by alpha
    AscendC::Muls(expLocal, expLocal, alpha_, len); // expLocal = alpha * (exp(x)-1)

    // Negative part: min(expLocal, 0)
    AscendC::Duplicate(oneOrZero, 0.0f, len); // reuse as zeros
    AscendC::Min(expLocal, expLocal, oneOrZero, len); // expLocal = min(... , 0)

    // Positive part: max(x, 0)
    AscendC::Duplicate(oneOrZero, 0.0f, len); // zeros again
    AscendC::Max(yLocal, xLocal, oneOrZero, len); // yLocal = max(x, 0)

    // Combine
    AscendC::Add(yLocal, yLocal, expLocal, len);

    // Free temps
    tmpQueue_.FreeTensor(oneOrZero);
    tmpQueue_.FreeTensor(expLocal);
    outQueueY_.EnQue<float>(yLocal);
    inQueueX_.FreeTensor(xLocal);
}
```
